description: Migration of Java/Oracle PL/SQL monolith to Spring Boot microservices on Azure

stories.title: Configure API Gateway on Azure APIM
stories.description: Set up Azure API Management to front the legacy monolith while microservices are built

stories.title: Define microservice domain boundaries for customer portal
stories.description: Document bounded contexts and define service contracts

stories.title: Implement strangler fig routing via APIM policies
stories.description: Route 10% traffic to new microservice for A/B testing

stories.title: Create customer profile microservice skeleton
stories.description: Spring Boot 3 service with basic CRUD and OpenAPI spec

stories.title: Implement OAuth2 / Azure AD B2C integration
stories.description: Replace legacy session auth with token-based auth

stories.title: Migrate customer read endpoints to microservice
stories.description: Move GET /customers/* from monolith to new service

stories.title: Implement event-driven customer update notifications
stories.description: Publish domain events to Azure Service Bus

stories.title: Performance testing: customer portal under 500 concurrent users
stories.description: Load test with k6 ensuring p99 < 500ms

stories.title: GDPR consent management API
stories.description: Implement consent capture, storage, and audit trail

stories.title: Switch 100% traffic from monolith to microservice
stories.description: Final cutover via APIM policy update with rollback plan

stories.title: Audit and document Oracle PL/SQL stored procedures
stories.description: Catalog 47 stored procedures, identify data flows and dependencies

stories.title: Design PostgreSQL target schema for customer domain
stories.description: ERD and migration plan for customer tables

stories.title: Implement schema migration scripts with Flyway
stories.description: Versioned migrations with rollback support

stories.title: Data sync: Oracle-to-PostgreSQL dual-write phase
stories.description: Dual-write period to validate data consistency before cutover

stories.title: Implement PII data masking for non-prod environments
stories.description: GDPR compliance: mask PII in dev/test schemas

stories.title: Migrate orders domain tables to PostgreSQL
stories.description: Orders, order_items, order_status migration with referential integrity

stories.title: Decommission Oracle sequences, replace with UUIDs
stories.description: Replace numeric PKs with UUIDs for microservice compatibility

stories.title: Performance baseline: PostgreSQL query plan analysis
stories.description: Run EXPLAIN ANALYZE on top-20 queries, create missing indexes

stories.title: Oracle to PostgreSQL stored procedure conversion — batch 1
stories.description: Convert 15 business-critical stored procs to Spring Data JPA

stories.title: Oracle decommission: final validation and cutover
stories.description: Final data consistency check and Oracle shutdown plan

stories.title: Provision AKS cluster with Terraform
stories.description: 2-node AKS cluster with autoscaling, managed identity, Key Vault integration

stories.title: Create Azure DevOps build pipeline for microservices
stories.description: YAML pipeline: build, test, Docker push to ACR

stories.title: Implement GitOps deployment with Helm charts
stories.description: Helm chart per microservice, environment-specific values

stories.title: Set up Azure Monitor and Application Insights
stories.description: Distributed tracing, custom dashboards, SLA alerts

stories.title: Configure Azure Key Vault for secrets management
stories.description: All credentials via Key Vault; eliminate config file secrets

stories.title: Implement blue/green deployment strategy
stories.description: Zero-downtime deployments with APIM traffic shifting

stories.title: Container security scanning in pipeline
stories.description: Integrate Trivy into build pipeline; fail on CRITICAL CVEs

stories.title: Infrastructure cost optimization — reserved instances
stories.description: Switch dev/test to spot instances; reserve prod nodes

stories.title: Disaster recovery: multi-region failover plan
stories.description: Geo-redundant AKS, Azure Front Door, RTO < 30 min

stories.title: End-to-end pipeline smoke test and runbook
stories.description: Full deploy-to-production runbook with automated smoke tests
